titleStmt.title: SII 17.636: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 636. (A.R. No. 587 of 1904.) ŚRĪNIVĀSANALLŪR, MUSIRI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south and east walls of the Kuraṅganātha temple.
This inscription is dated in the reign of Madirai-koṇḍa Parakēsari i.e., Parāntaka I.

It records the sale of land as dēvadāna made free of the taxes iṟai and veṭṭi to Śrī Kurakkuttuṟai-pperumāṉaḍigaḷ by the Mūlaparaḍai of Mahēndramaṅgalam, a brahmadēya for 156(1/2) kaḻañju received from Tirukkuṟakkuttuṟai Nambi alias Pāṉachchaṉ Nārāyaṇañ[chokkaṉ].
The name of the madhyasthan of the paraḍai is given as Indaṇa Mūvaṇaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . matirai koṇṭakopparakecarivaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 9 Irupattoṉpatāvatu
brahmadeya mahentramaṅkalattu tirukkurakkuttuṟai nampiyāṉa pāṉaccaṉ nārāyaṇañ
cokkaṉ perumakkaḷiṭaik koṇṭu ceyvicca tevatāṉam Ivvūr mulaparaṭaiyom śrī ku
rakkuttuṟaip perumāṉaṭikaḷiṭaip palavakaiyālumākak koṇṭa tuḷaippoṉ kuṭiñai
kkallāl 100 5 10 6ma72 nūṟṟaimpattaṟukaḻañcey Eṭṭu mañcāṭip poṉa nūṟṟaimpa
ttaṟu kaḻañcey Eṭṭumañcāṭip poṉṉukkut tirukkurakkutuṟaip perumāḷukku
Iṟaiyili devatāṉamākacceytu viṟṟukkuṭutta nilam vayaṉ nilattu
ḷ Ālañcey [ ndha2pama] yum kaḷāñcey �ma� kiḻakku2pa Iraṇṭu māveṉṉum piyaru
ma �yum kiḻpirāṟṟu � yum puṉṉai vākkāliṉ teṉ vāykkā
l �mayum Araicaṅkāl 2pa�yum kuṇṭai vaḷḷivā
kkāliṉ vaṭavākkāl � yum Āka nilam 1tma�
� Oṉṟey mukkāṇi muntirikaiyarai nilamum
tirukkurakkuttuṟaip perumāṉaṭikaḷukku Iṟai
yili devatāṉamāka viṟṟukkuṭuttu Ivvilai
pporuḷ nūṟṟaimpattaṟu kaḻañcey Eṭṭu
mañcāṭip poṉṉum Āvaṇakkaḷiyey Aṟa
k koṇṭu In nila 1 tma� Oṉṟey mukkāṇi
muntirikaiyarai nilamum candrādityavat
iṟaiyilidevatāṉamāka viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇa
ñ ceytu kuṭuttom mulaparaṭaiyom tirukkura
kkuttuṟaip perumāṉaṭikaḷukku Innilattāl
vanta Iṟaiyum veṭṭiyu maṟṟum Ūriṭuvariyā
l vantatu Epperppaṭṭatuṅ kāṭṭātatāka
Iṟaiyiḻittu Iṟaiyilidevatāṉamāka viṟ
ṟukkuṭuttom mulaparaṭaiyom tirukkurakku
ttuṟaip perumāṉaṭikaḷukku paraṭai paṇikka E
ḻutiṉeṉ paraṭai maddhyasthaṉ Intaṇa muvaṇaṉ
Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu [.]
Digital edition of SII 17.636 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
